Category: Artillery Shells

The smallest of field pieces. the standard 105 continues to soldier on. It takes a minimum crew of two men and works best with four. May use an autoloader and rock et-assisted shells. HVY + 1 N P 11010 1 1 VR 100,000 euro, 6 spaces. Shells cost 500 euro and take up 1 space per 5 shells. 150mm Howitzer: This gun may be up to 155mm; it works the same. It takes a crew of four to operate this go lia th. May use an autoloader and rocket-assisted shells. HVY + 1 N P 13010 1 1 VR 150,000 euro, 20 spaces. Shells cost 1000 euro and take up 1 space apiece. 200mm Howitzer: The 8" monster cannon; few guns of this size are seen on the mobile battlefields of 2020. This cannon takes a four man crew. May use an autoloader and rocket­ assisted shells. HVY O N P 28010 1 1/2 VR
